name: Crab Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Canned whole tomatoes; Three 1-pound cans, or equivalent
recipeInstructions: Remove all cartilage from Crabmeat. In a 4 or 5 quart pot, cook onion, celery, and garlic in butter or margarine until tender. Add tomatoes, okra, and seasonings. Cover and simmer for 1 hour. Add Crabmeat and heat through. Serve over hot cooked rice.
